zh.Cockburnspath, Berwickshire, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭貝維其可爾考可波斯帕斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Dunbar於1425年出生在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安時，她的父親David Dunbar of Cockburn and Auchtermonzie46歲，母親Beatrice45歲。她於1440年與Alexander Lindsay 4th Earl of Crawford在英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1499年4月24日在蘇格蘭貝維其可爾享年74歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Dunbar于1425年出生在苏格兰米德洛迪安时，她的父亲David Dunbar of Cockburn and Auchtermonzie46岁，母亲Beatrice45岁。她于1440年与Alexander Lindsay 4th Earl of Crawford在英国苏格兰藍納可爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1499年4月24日在苏格兰貝維其可爾享年74岁。

nameMeanings.name: Dunbar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Dunbar, a place on the North Sea coast near Edinburgh, named with Gaelic dùn ‘fort’ + barr ‘top, summit’.

History: A family of this name were granted the lands of Dunbar by Malcolm III (1058–1093), and later acquired the earldoms of Dunbar and March. These earldoms were then withdrawn from the family by James I in 1434.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Dunbar was born in 1425, in Midlothian, Scotland, her father, David Dunbar of Cockburn and Auchtermonzie, was 46 and her mother, Beatrice, was 45. She married Alexander Lindsay 4th Earl of Crawford in 1440, in Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 24 April 1499, in Berwickshire, Scotland, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Dunbar est née en 1425, à Midlothian, Écosse, son père, David Dunbar of Cockburn and Auchtermonzie, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Beatrice, avait 45 ans. Elle a épousé Alexander Lindsay 4th Earl of Crawford en 1440, à Lanarkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 24 avril 1499, à Berwickshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 74 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Dunbar 1425 in Midlothian, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater David Dunbar of Cockburn and Auchtermonzie 46 und ihre Mutter Beatrice 45. Sie hat 1440 in Lanarkshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Alexander Lindsay 4th Earl of Crawford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 24. April 1499 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Berwickshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Dunbar è nata il nel 1425 nel Midlothian, Scotland, sua padre, David Dunbar of Cockburn and Auchtermonzie, aveva 46 anni e sua madre, Beatrice, aveva 45 anni. Lei sposato Alexander Lindsay 4th Earl of Crawford nel 1440, nel Lanarkshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 24 aprile 1499, nel Berwickshire, Scotland, all'età di 74 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Dunbarが1425年にスコットランドミドロスアンで生まれた時，父David Dunbar of Cockburn and Auchtermonzieは46歳，母Beatriceは45歳であった。1440年にイギリススコットランドラナルクシュアイアでAlexander Lindsay 4th Earl of Crawfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1499年4月24日にスコットランドバーウィクシュアイアで74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Dunbar(이)가 1425년 스컷랜드 미들로스이언에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 David Dunbar of Cockburn and Auchtermonzie(은)는 46세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrice(은)는 45세였다. 그녀는 1440년 영국 스코틀랜드 랜아르크실르에서 Alexander Lindsay 4th Earl of Crawford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1499년 4월 24일 스컷랜드 버윅실르에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Dunbar nasceu em 1425, em Midlothian, Scotland, seu pai, David Dunbar of Cockburn and Auchtermonzie, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Beatrice, tinha 45 anos. Ela casou-se com Alexander Lindsay 4th Earl of Crawford em 1440, em Lanarkshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 24 de abril de 1499, em Berwickshire, Scotland, com 74 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Dunbar родилась в 1425 г. в местности мидлотян, Шотландия, её отцу по имени David Dunbar of Cockburn and Auchtermonzie было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrice, 45. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alexander Lindsay 4th Earl of Crawford в 1440 г. в местности ланаркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 24 апреля 1499 г. в местности бирвиккшир, Шотландия в возрасте 74 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Dunbar nació en 1425, en Midlothian, Scotland, su papá, David Dunbar of Cockburn and Auchtermonzie, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Beatrice, tenía 45 años. Se casó con Alexander Lindsay 4th Earl of Crawford en 1440, en Lanarkshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 24 de abril de 1499, en Berwickshire, Scotland, a la edad de 74 años.
